command: fabio data-agent query --workspace $WS_ID --id $AGENT_ID --question "What are the top 5 products by revenue?" --stage sandbox
description: Queries a Data Agent with a natural language question. Returns the agent's SQL/KQL answer, explanation, and generated query.

data.answer: The top 5 products by revenue are: Widget Pro ($1.2M), Gadget X ($980K), SuperTool ($875K), MegaPack ($720K), BasicKit ($650K).
data.query: SELECT TOP 5 ProductName, SUM(Revenue) as TotalRevenue FROM dbo.Sales GROUP BY ProductName ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC

notes: Use --stage sandbox (draft) or --stage production (published). The agent must have datasources configured and tables selected. Requires the agent to be published for --stage production. Use --timeout to control max wait (default: 120s).

query_examples.description: Check if the query completed successfully.
